chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3783 of 2025 Mst. Samina Bibi Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2.For hearing of main case. Dated: 19.09.2025 Mr. Qadir H. Khan, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Abdul Samad Khan, advocate for NADRA. -.-.- Learned counsel for NADRA has submitted the report stating that in favour of certain children of missing person namely Shamshad Ali, whose CNIC has been blocked under the orders of this Court, the Children Registration Certificate (CRC) is issued, however learned counsel for the petitioner submits that names of Laiba and Farwa, daughters of missing person are not being registered in the CRC and also CNIC of a son of missing person namely Salman has been blocked and is not being unblocked. Learned counsel for the NADRA is directed to receive application(s) and do the needful by registering in CRC the names of daughters of missing person and unblock the CNIC of son of the missing person in accordance with law. The petitioner is directed to visit NADRA office within a week so that all formalities may be completed. Petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge
